title: Oblivion
description: A forgotten dimension conquerable only by the toughest
body:
[![ServerAtelier](https://www.serveratelier.com/assets/themes/atelier/assets/images/banner/sa_budget.png)](https://www.serveratelier.com/) ![Headline](https://i.imgur.com/1YIqGYQ.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/Oblivion/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/Oblivion/issues)


The word "Oblivion" means a condition or quality of being completely forgotten. This mod adds an Oblivion where new adventures await. It is meant for late game progression. A lot of ideas are still to be done. How to get to this new dimension? Build a teleporter like in the following image. ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/vQzMOLu.png) ![Showcase](https://github.com/Globox1997/Oblivion/blob/master/images/2026-02-10_12.57.53.png?raw=true) ![Showcase](https://github.com/Globox1997/Oblivion/blob/master/images/2026-02-10_12.58.44.png?raw=true) ![Showcase](https://github.com/Globox1997/Oblivion/blob/master/images/2026-02-10_13.00.52.png?raw=true)

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
